creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
pmc: Unknown Intel CPU.
module_register_init: MOD_LOAD (hwpmc, 0xffffffff802d2610, 0xffffffffb2241f60) error 78
I get the above on kldload of hwpmc on my Xeon 5120 based system

hw.machine: amd64
hw.model: Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU            5120  @ 1.86GHz
hw.ncpu: 4

Fix: 

I am willing to give ssh(1) access to a developer, as well as having the 
current Intel Doc. 

I'm willing to help figure out what needs done, but pointers would be
useful.
How-To-Repeat: kldload hwpmc on a Xeon 5xxx series system.
